hypothesis: If the stereochemistry-aware diffusion model LoQI is trained on the ChEMBL3D conformer dataset and used to generate conformers with stereochemical augmentation, then the resulting conformers will have lower relative energy to the dataset minimum, higher stereochemical accuracy for R/S and E/Z, and smaller RMSD to reference structures compared with conformers generated by the baseline dataset, indicating near-DFT-quality accuracy.
